title: Torrezx-Shulker tools
description: Shulker's tools and weapons, perfect for exploring the End. Vanilla cit
body:
Torrezx-Shulker tools

Español:

Las herramientas de Shulker,el componente perfecto para ir a explorar el end y luchar con
ferozidad en las end city,es tu momento,acaba con todos y demuestra tu fortaleza.

English:

Shulker's tools, the perfect component to explore the end and fight fiercely in the end cities, it's your time, take them all down and show your strength.

Reemplaza/Replace:
-Diamond tools
-Bow and Crossbow
-Mace

Requerimientos-Requirements:

-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
